div.head: The Acting Secretary of State to the Minister in Liberia (Francis)
div.p: 25. Your 29, August 15, 9 a.m. At hearing of Federal Radio Commission held August 17 both Firestone and the Department presented and supported the views of President King as indicated in his telegram to Firestone of July 30See footnote 46, p. 268. and in your 29Telegram of August 15, p. 270. with the result that the Commission has granted the Radio Corporation of America a license for general radio communication with Liberia, thus making possible the establishment of the double line of direct public service radio communications between Liberia and the United States desired by the Liberian Government.
